reference.name: OpenAI public website clarity standard
reference.instruction: Use OpenAI-level restraint, hierarchy, spacing, precision, and explanatory graphics as the visual reference. Do not copy literal page design; translate the clarity discipline into Capital Radar's investment operating system.

homepage_layers.name: Macro Reading
homepage_layers.ux_rule: One coherent market-regime read, not scattered authority panels.

homepage_layers.name: Market Execution Map
homepage_layers.ux_rule: Preserve the working map; add evidence support and scenario invalidation.

homepage_layers.name: Portfolio / Price Zone Radar
homepage_layers.ux_rule: Preserve the zone system; enrich with fundamentals, valuation, catalysts, and sizing permission.

homepage_layers.name: Opportunity Research
homepage_layers.decision_question: What deserves new capital or deeper research?
homepage_layers.ux_rule: No unsupported ranking boards. Each candidate must expose thesis, evidence, blockers, and upgrade/reject triggers.

homepage_layers.name: Evidence / Trust Access
homepage_layers.ux_rule: Quiet audit layer. Trust must be embedded into claims and available for inspection.

layout: prefer calm wide sections over many competing panels
use generous spacing and clear grouping
keep one decision function per section
integrate related signals instead of fragmenting them
use progressive disclosure for dense evidence
typography: use editorial-scale text only for high-level interpretation
color: restrained palette for permission, warning, risk, missing data
no foreign dark panels unless the whole system is intentionally redesigned
interaction: prefer drill-down, expansion, and source links
density: top layer shows conclusion and permission
second layer shows evidence for and against
third layer shows source detail and raw artifact

avoid_terms: buy/sell language without trigger sizing and invalidation

component_acceptance_test: Which product layer does this serve?
What decision question does it answer?
What action or permission does it affect?
What does it replace, integrate, or clarify?
Does it preserve the OpenAI-style clarity reference?
non_negotiable: Visual organization is part of the intelligence system. Every new display must make the reasoning chain clearer.
